name: ai-usage-monitor
description: Quality tooling and checks for ai_usage_monitor

scripts.format: ./.venv/bin/python -m ruff format core tests com.aiusagemonitor/contents/scripts gnome-extension/aiusagemonitor@aimonitor/scripts bin/ai-usage-monitor-state
scripts.format:check: ./.venv/bin/python -m ruff format --check core tests com.aiusagemonitor/contents/scripts gnome-extension/aiusagemonitor@aimonitor/scripts bin/ai-usage-monitor-state
